_note: Maps feature-name patterns to their upstream data source files and freshness SLAs. Preflight uses this to verify the trader is being fed correctly. Patterns are matched in the order listed — first match wins. {asset} is substituted with the lowercase asset name (e.g. {asset}=eth).

rules.description: PySR formulas. Loaded lazily; age doesn't matter as long as inputs are fresh.
Deribit options IV + skew (hourly, ring buffer).
Binance perp funding rate + open interest + perp-spot basis.

CoinMetrics on-chain data (MVRV, SOPR, netflow, hashrate, tx_count, etc.). Daily; CoinMetrics free tier publishes T-1 with ~24h base delay AND occasional later catch-up — SLA 60h to absorb publish gaps without restart-looping the trader (M-24 fix 2026-04-25).
USDT + USDC total market cap (CoinGecko daily).
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (Alternative.me daily, updates ~midnight UTC). 24h cadence + API delay tolerance = 36h SLA.
BTC intraday lead-lag (ETH/XRP/SOL/LINK models). Needs BTC OHLCV fresh even if BTC is not traded.
ETH intraday lead-lag (XRP/SOL/LINK models). Needs ETH OHLCV fresh even if ETH is not traded.
Daily cross-asset relstr/corr vs BTC-USD or ETH-USD.

Cross-asset relative-strength + correlation vs equity indices. Daily bars = yfinance market-close. SLA bumped 72h→96h on 2026-04-27 — Monday morning before US market close means most-recent yfinance daily is still Friday (Fri close → Mon morning = ~91h gap). 96h handles Mon-morning + Mon-holiday cases.

Macro daily — VIX, DXY, equity, commodities, rates, FX. yfinance daily bars publish at market close. SLA bumped 72h→96h on 2026-04-27: Monday-morning trading sees Fri close + ~3 days = ~91h gap before Monday's bar publishes. 96h handles Mon-morning + Mon-holiday.
GDELT geopolitical features. DISABLED from pipeline 2026-04-19 but kept for reference.

default.description: Technical features (logret_*, volatility_*, sma_*, adx_*, rsi_*, spread_*, vol_ratio_*, stoch_*, price_*, bb_*, gk_*, atr_*, hour_*, dow_*, intraday_*, volume_*, label) — derived from primary asset OHLCV.
